## Description

<!-- What does this PR do? Why is it needed? Link any related issues. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature / diagnostic (non-breaking)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Refactor / internal cleanup
- [ ] Security-related (please call out explicitly)

## How was this tested?

- [ ] `make ci` passes locally
- [ ] Added/updated unit tests
- [ ] Added/updated integration tests (fixtures)
- [ ] Security tests still green (`make security`)
- [ ] Manually tested with `make demo` and/or real QM
- [ ] Updated docs / README / VISION if user-facing

## Checklist

- [ ] My changes respect the read-only contract and sanitizer
- [ ] No new external URLs without updating KC verification
- [ ] I considered the threat model / RBAC impact
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (if applicable)

## Screenshots / Output (if relevant)

**Note from owner**: High standards here. If you're unsure about security implications, open an issue first.
